title.en: Deep in the gray fog area.

content.en:
Deep in the gray fog area.

Ye Tian's current strength is extremely terrifying. He is almost invincible among the Eternal Ultimate Palace Masters. In addition, he has multiple copies of his body. Even if he encounters multiple extremely terrifying fog beasts, he can successfully escape.

Gradually, he went deep into the deepest part of the gray fog area. There was a black fog here, which was dozens of times more powerful than the gray fog.

He approached here and absorbed a wisp of black fog. Suddenly, his copy body seemed to be transformed into a fog beast. He quickly resisted and tried to practice the atomization form.

But the first time, he failed.

However, he successfully released the copy body and was not transformed into a fog beast.

In the days that followed, he sacrificed many copies of his body and practiced the atomization form again and again. His understanding of the black fog became deeper and deeper, and he could persist for a long time without being affected.

After countless attempts, this time he finally succeeded in refining a wisp of black fog, and this was a good start.

Later, it became easier and easier for him to refine the black mist, and he was gradually mastering the atomization form!

And on this day, he successfully mastered the real atomization form, and atomized with this black mist, and his strength increased many times.

After that, he tried to deduce the Extreme Blood Armor, Extreme Blood Blade, and Extreme Blood Escape to the level of the eternal ultimate space-time level-heavy palace secret method.

With the help of the ancient stone tablet, he sacrificed his duplicate body again and again to deduce, and with the experience of creating the ultimate space-time level arcane, it would not be too difficult this time.

Sure enough, after spending a long time, he successfully deduced the Extreme Blood Armor, Extreme Blood Blade, and Extreme Blood Escape to the level of the eternal ultimate space-time level heavy palace secret method, and his strength has reached an incredible level.

It can be said that the strength of his current clone is almost the same as that of the original body in another time and space line, and the two time and space lines are only one step away from the ultimate supreme of time and space level.

"Go to other realms of this time and space line and take a look!"

Ye Tian kept shuttling and soon came to another realm. This realm seemed to be not weak, with seven or eight eternal ultimate palace masters, but he was still trapped here.

He crossed the realms and met many eternal ultimate palace masters, but they could not do anything about the gray fog area. A few could take the risk to shuttle through the gray fog area, but that was all.

As for other time and space lines, these guys didn't understand and didn't notice any crisis.

Moreover, their strength was very weak, and Ye Tian was too lazy to communicate with them.

Although the gray fog area is dangerous, it has to be admitted that there are really many good things here. He has obtained many treasures similar to the mysterious ancient stone tablet. With the help of these treasures, he constantly deduced the paths of the two time and space lines and gradually gained a lot of insights.

In addition, he also cultivated the final form and the atomized form to the extreme, and tried to merge the eternal ultimate palace rules with the ultimate rules of the ultimate way of all laws, so as to create a time beyond the limit.The Ultimate Rule of Space-level Extreme Dao!

After a long time, he finally realized a quasi-time-space-level ultimate rule of the Ultimate Rule ...

In this way, Ye Tian comprehended the paths of multiple time and space lines, and naturally gained more and more. He fought with the strong men of each time and space line and snatched a lot of good things.

With the help of these treasures, he integrated the paths of various time and space lines, and his understanding of the ultimate rules of the time and space level was getting deeper and deeper.

"Almost!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

That day.

He integrated the ultimate rules of the extreme way of many time and space lines together, allowing his ultimate rules of the extreme way of all laws to complete the transformation and reach the realm of the ultimate rules of the time and space level.

At the same time, he had a kind of enlightenment.

As soon as he thought about it, the replica bodies and many incarnations of the time and space lines collapsed one after another, and many powers were integrated into the main body.

His body was transforming every moment, and all the great powers of time and space poured into his body, allowing him to gradually break the shackles.

……

"That's the Supreme Master of All Laws. Has he broken through?"

All the Ultimate Ancient Demons, Ancient Demon-level Powerful Ones, and Ultimate Supreme Masters were all shocked.

Many of the powerful people of the human race were also shocked. If Ye Tian broke through, then their time and space line would be saved!

0Seeking flowers

Just when Ye Tian was about to break through, the origins of the time and space lines appeared one by one, trying to stop Ye Tian.

Because Ye Tian wanted to achieve the Ultimate Supreme Master of the Time and Space Level, he wanted to transcend all time and space lines, so the origins of those time and space lines would come to stop him.

However, everything was too late. Ye Tian's accumulation was too deep, and all the roads were promoted to the extreme.

Ye Tian directly erupted with terrifying power, spanning many time and space, and shattered the will of the time and space lines one by one.

It was unknown how long it had passed, but his body had truly transformed, becoming a Space-Time Ultimate Supreme.

At the same time, he knew that there were six Space-Time Ultimate Supremes on the Space-Time line, and he was seven.

And these sixEach of them has built their own eternal space-time line, which will never be affected by disasters and is a truly free and unfettered place.

"Congratulations to you for transcending everything!"

Six space-time-level ultimate and supreme masters crossed many space-time lines and congratulated him.

"Thank you, fellow Taoists!"

Ye Tian responded.

Immediately, he spent some time to stabilize his realm, and then he opened up an eternal space-time line in the place where all space-time was annihilated outside the space-time line.

Then, he moved all the human race to this new eternal space-time line, and resurrected some people who could not be resurrected in the past, and moved them all to the new eternal space-time line.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian moved all the other creatures in the space-time line into his own eternal space-time line, and those ancient demon-level masters and ultimate ancient demons were also moved over by him, just as an opponent for the human race.

The Doomsday Supreme and his companions naturally entered the new eternal space-time line, and from then on they no longer had to worry about the final doomsday catastrophe!

After dealing with everything, Ye Tian crossed many space-time lines and came to a small courtyard, where five people were waiting for him.

"Five Taoist friends, here I come!"[]

"Master of the All-Faced Space-Time Dao, please take a seat and drink. This is the supreme wine that I have brewed for an entire space-time line..."

Ye Tian immediately took a seat, and six voices chatted here, their voices spanning many space-time lines.

This is the real eternity!

(The finale! B).
